ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the stock */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the company is listed */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the industry */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the company is headquartered */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Initial Public Offering date of the stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the stock information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price record */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock for the day */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock for the day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock for the day */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock for the day */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded for the day */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock for the day */,
  "pre_market_price" REAL /* Pre-market trading price */,
  "after_market_price" REAL /* After-market trading price */,
  "daily_change" REAL /* Daily percentage change in the closing price */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the historical data */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality score of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_prices_source FOREIGN KEY ("source") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., investor, analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON column to store user permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session */,
  "data_accessed" TEXT /* JSON column to store the specific data accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock related to the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., market movement, anomaly) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the notification has been read */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the notification */,
  "triggered_by" TEXT /* Event or condition that triggered the notification */,
  "read_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was read */,
  "dismissed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was dismissed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., exchange, third-party provider) */,
  "last_fetch_date" TEXT /* Date of the last data fetch from the source */,
  "reliability_score" REAL /* Reliability score of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role to which the permission is assigned */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "permission_value" INTEGER /* Value of the permission (true or false) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES users ("role")
)
